candidates.rationale: Already compiled into binary via axum ws feature. De facto Rust WebSocket standard. Promote to direct dep to avoid relying on axum internal feature surface.

candidates.rationale: Simplest fit for trivial GET/SET/DEL L2 tier. ConnectionManager provides native pooling + reconnect. Standard Rust Redis client.
